basics.name: Avery Morrow
basics.label: Novelist and essayist
basics.summary: Novelist and essayist. Former librarian. Interested in quiet books, the geography of grief, and the slow internet.

work.name: Self-employed
work.summary: Writing novels and essays full-time. Debut novel The Quiet Sky published by Vellum Press in 2025.
highlights: Longlisted for the Center for Fiction First Novel Prize (2025)
Essays published in The Paris Review, Granta, The Atlantic

work.name: Greenpoint Public Library
work.summary: Six years on the reference desk at a small-but-busy branch in Brooklyn.
highlights: Ran the weekly senior reading group for four years

work.name: Riverhead Books
work.summary: Editorial assistant on the literary fiction list.
